images.statement: LIGHT DOES NOT ILLUMINATE. IT DIVIDES.
images.alt: LIGHT 01 — LIGHT DOES NOT ILLUMINATE. IT DIVIDES. Monochrome light study exploring contrast, division, and spatial tension.
LIGHT 02 — LIGHT DRAWS THE BORDER. High-contrast monochrome photograph examining light as boundary and form.
LIGHT 03 — LIGHT EXPOSES YOU. Monochrome study of illumination revealing presence and depth.
LIGHT 04 — LIGHT COMMANDS THE PATH. Fine art monochrome photograph focused on directional light and visual guidance.
